VOL. CVIII Monpbay, 29TH AUGUST, 1977 66
*
FREETOWN. 29th August, 1977.
HOUSE OF PARLIAMENT
*
Govt. Notice No. 1140
=
The following Acts which were passed in Parliament on the 4th and 16th August, 1977 respectively and
signed by His Excellency the President on the 26th August, 1977 are hereby published as supplement to this number
of the Sierra Leone Gazette Extraordinary :-—
* '
Act No. 9 of 1977 entitled “‘ The Airports (Service Charges) (Amendment) Act, 1977
Act No. 10 of 1977 entitled “ The Airports (Service Charges) (arceaneaty (No. 2) Act, 1977 2,
Act No. 11 of 1977 entitled “ The National Registration (Amendment) Act, 1977”.
“Act No. 12 of 1977 entitled ‘‘ The Constitution (Amendment) Act, 1977”.
#
